content.title: Edit
description: Existing AOIs can be modified from this section.
Select any existing AOI to open the AOI view.
Use the Search for a Place box to quickly navigate to the required location on the map.
Click the Basemap icon to switch between the available basemaps.
Use the Draw/Edit tool to modify the AOI boundary by dragging the vertices or adjusting the boundary as required.
Use the Undo and Redo buttons to revert or reapply the recent changes.
Click the Delete button to remove the selected AOI boundary and redraw it if required.
Edit the AOI Name if required.
Then click on “Save Edits” to apply the changes or “Cancel” to discard them.
